calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (436 Edinburgh Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Theresa McGuire for petitioner and executor Thomas AmRhein (via Zoom).
Michael Young, listing agent (via Zoom).
Sonny Tang, buyer's agent (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Report of Sale and Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property.

The Court inquired whether any overbids were present in the courtroom or on Zoom. No overbids were received.

The Court confirmed the sale at $1,100,000.

The Court confirmed the sale of the real property for $1,100,000, subject to the terms and conditions set forth in the Report of Sale, and granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. The Court ordered an additional bond in the amount of $918,000.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (436 Edinburgh Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Continued To Apr-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Theresa A. McGuire for executor Thomas AmRhein.

The matter was called for hearing on Report of Sale and Petition for Order Confirming Sale of Real Property.

The Court addressed the issues raised in the probate examiner's notes, specifically that the instructions regarding remote appearances were not attached to the Notice of Hearing. Ms. McGuire inquired whether the requirement could be waived. The Court declined and advised that proper notice was required.

The matter was continued to April 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for proper notice.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
